description: Correct all unsafe or incorrect gas management data for the September 2011 Hoodsport trip (Dives #85 through #90) to ensure cylinder configurations are safe and plausible for the recorded dive profiles. Save the corrected logbook to /home/ga/Documents/corrected_logbook.xml.

dive_85.reason: 50% O2 has MOD of ~18m at 1.4 ppO2, but dive max depth is ~27m - unsafe

dive_86.reason: 3L cylinder cannot sustain a 40+ minute dive at depth

dive_87.reason: 50 bar working pressure is far too low for any scuba cylinder
